name: docker-storage-gc

scripts.lint: balena-lint -t tsconfig.dev.json -e ts -e js lib test tools
scripts.lint-fix: balena-lint --fix  -t tsconfig.dev.json -e ts -e js lib test tools
scripts.pretest: npm run prepare && npm run compose:docker-up
scripts.test:compose: npm run compose:down && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --build --remove-orphans --rm sut
scripts.compose:docker-up: npm run compose:down && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --remove-orphans --wait docker
scripts.posttest: npm run compose:down && npm run lint

author: Balena Ltd. <hello@balena.io>
description: Automatically cleanup unused images based on various cache replacement algorithms
